headline: $1.49 Bn Elastomeric Infusion Pumps Market by Type, Application, End-use Industry, and Region - Global Forecast to 2030
summary: The elastomeric infusion pumps market is poised to grow from USD 1.15 billion in 2025 to USD 1.49 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 5.3%. Increasing demand in oncology, pain management, anesthesia, and home care drives this growth, emphasizing the need for portable non-electronic devices. Regulatory advancements and sustainable innovations enhance product design, extending applications particularly in hospitals. North America leads the market owing to advanced healthcare and supportive policies. Com

headline: Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index Adds Eleven Securities Following March Reconstitution
summary: Bloomberg Indices announced the following changes to the Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index effective prior to the open of trading on Thursday, March 12, 2026, to coincide with the March reconstitution of the index. The B500 contains the 500 most highly capitalized US companies weighted by float market cap, reflecting a market capitalization of $58.19 trillion.
